tools.name: calculator
tools.purpose: Safe exact arithmetic, percentages, totals, rates, and multi-step word problems.

tools.name: constraint_solver
tools.purpose: Compile and exhaustively verify small assignment and ordering puzzles.

tools.name: contract_guard
tools.purpose: Enforce sentence, word, bullet, JSON, answer-only, NER coverage, and code contracts.

tools.name: code_lab
tools.purpose: Isolate requested Python functions and run bounded semantic tests for recognized specifications.

tools.name: evidence_ledger
tools.purpose: Ground mixed-sentiment labels in positive and negative cues from the prompt.

tools.name: knowledge_capsule
tools.purpose: Answer stable computing and science fundamentals without network access or model hallucination.

tools.name: entity_auditor
tools.purpose: Inventory explicit names, organizations, locations, dates, URLs, and paths before NER output.

adaptive_compute.easy_tasks: one model pass or one deterministic tool call
adaptive_compute.hard_tasks: candidate generation, deterministic validation, then bounded repair
